raw_cv_text:
Peak Ruiz
+1 (415) 287-3641 | Email: peak.ruiz@gmail.com | LinkedIn: peak-ruiz | GitHub: PeakRuiz | https://peakruiz.dev
EDUCATION
University of Michigan | B.S. in Computer Science 2018 - 2022
Led capstone project on real-time data pipeline optimization, achieving 40% latency reduction across systems
Active member of Michigan Hackers and competed in HackMichigan 2021, winning Best Full Stack Application award
Coursera & Udacity | Deep Learning Specialization & Full Stack Nanodegree 2022 - 2023
Completed advanced courses in cloud architecture and microservices design on AWS and Google Cloud
Earned credentials in React, Node.js, and PostgreSQL with distinction
EXPERIENCE
Stripe | Full Stack Engineer January 2023 - Present
Architected and shipped a new payment reconciliation dashboard reducing manual reconciliation time by 65%, saving
Operations team 120 hours monthly
Optimized critical database queries using PostgreSQL indexing strategies and caching, improving API response times by
48% for 50M+ monthly transactions
Led migration of legacy REST endpoints to GraphQL, enabling 12 client teams to reduce network requests by 35% and
improve user experience
Figma | Senior Software Engineer (Full Stack) June 2022 - December 2022
Developed collaborative real-time editing features using WebSockets and Operational Transformation, serving 500K+
concurrent users with 99.97% uptime
Refactored React component library, reducing bundle size by 42% and improving time-to-interactive metric from 3.2s to
1.8s
Implemented comprehensive monitoring and alerting system that reduced incident detection time from 45 minutes to 5
minutes
Datadog | Software Engineer August 2021 - May 2022
Built distributed trace analysis service handling 2 billion traces daily, enabling 150+ enterprise customers to debug
production issues 3x faster
Developed internal CLI tool in Go that automated deployment workflows, reducing release cycle time by 58% across 8
engineering teams
Designed and implemented event streaming pipeline using Kafka and Node.js microservices, processing 500K events per
second with zero data loss
PROJECTS
StreamSync Analytics | React, Node.js, PostgreSQL, Redis, AWS Lambda March 2023 - July 2023
Built real-time analytics dashboard for monitoring SaaS metrics, processing 100K+ events/second with sub-100ms
latency using Redis caching
Achieved 94% test coverage with Jest and Cypress, reducing production bugs by 72% compared to previous
implementations
DebugFlow - Open Source DevTools | TypeScript, React, Electron, Node.js, Chrome October 2022 - February 2023
DevTools Protocol
Designed debugging tool for full-stack JavaScript applications with 2.8K GitHub stars, attracting 150+ monthly active
contributors
Optimized DevTools extension to reduce memory overhead by 64%, enabling inspection of applications with 5GB+ of
state
AsyncFlow Job Queue | Python, FastAPI, RabbitMQ, SQLAlchemy, Docker May 2022 - September 2022
Published distributed job queue library enabling asynchronous task processing with automatic retry logic, reducing failed
job rates by 89%
Documented API with 200+ code examples and tutorials, achieving 15K+ monthly downloads on PyPI
CloudVault - Encrypted Cloud Storage | Next.js, TypeScript, Prisma, PostgreSQL, AWS S3, December 2021 - April 2022
TweetNaCl
Engineered end-to-end encrypted cloud storage application supporting 1GB+ files with client-side encryption, achieving
zero-knowledge architecture
Implemented efficient chunked upload system reducing upload time by 76% for large files through parallel processing
EXTRACURRICULAR
Tech Community - Full Stack Mentorship Program | Technical Mentor & Speaker 2022 - Present
Mentored 12 junior developers transitioning into full-stack roles, with 100% of mentees securing engineering positions
within 6 months
Delivered 5 technical talks at major conferences (React Conf, NodeConf, PyCon US) on distributed systems and
performance optimization, reaching 8,000+ engineers
Open Source Contributors Circle | Core Contributor & Maintainer 2021 - Present
Contributed 340+ commits to popular open-source projects including Next.js, tRPC, and Prisma with 28 accepted PRs
improving codebase quality
Organized monthly virtual hackathons for junior engineers, growing community from 200 to 2,800+ active participants
TECHNICAL SKILLS
Languages – JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, SQL, HTML/CSS
Technologies – React, Next.js, Node.js, Express, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis, GraphQL, REST APIs,
WebSockets, Microservices, Docker, Kubernetes
Tools – Git, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (EC2, RDS, Lambda, S3), Google Cloud Platform, GitHub, GitLab, Jira, VS Code,
Postman, DataDog, New Relic
name: Email
